note: Template for Galaxy (Galaxy Europe) provenance. The Galaxy path requires a usegalaxy.eu API key at ~/.galaxy_eu_key. After a real run, scripts/cellprofiler_tracking.py records the invocation id(s) and the public history URL here; fill the fields below from results/.galaxy_cache.json and results/track_summary.json. Until then the pipeline runs via the local same-algorithm path (engine=local:skimage). Verified 2026-06: workflow/main_workflow.ga imports to usegalaxy.eu and all 13 CellProfiler steps resolve to installed tools.
method: CellProfiler object tracking (Starting Modules -> ColorToGray -> IdentifyPrimaryObjects -> MeasureObjectSizeShape -> MeasureObjectIntensity -> TrackObjects[Overlap] -> OverlayOutlines -> Tile -> SaveImages -> ExportToSpreadsheet)
target: Atmospheric rivers in ERA5 IVT (North Pacific, early February 2017), ARCO-ERA5
